<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f4f7fb"/>
  <rect x="56" y="70" width="400" height="372" rx="28" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d9e2ef" stroke-width="6"/>

  <!-- upward growth line -->
  <path d="M110 354 L170 318 L226 282 L286 246 L346 180 L396 138" fill="none" stroke="#2f80ed" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <path d="M396 138 L375 141 L387 121" fill="none" stroke="#2f80ed" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

  <!-- faint chart bars -->
  <rect x="96" y="320" width="26" height="34" rx="6" fill="#dfe8f5"/>
  <rect x="136" y="300" width="26" height="54" rx="6" fill="#dfe8f5"/>
  <rect x="176" y="280" width="26" height="74" rx="6" fill="#dfe8f5"/>
  <rect x="216" y="250" width="26" height="104" rx="6" fill="#dfe8f5"/>
  <rect x="256" y="224" width="26" height="130" rx="6" fill="#dfe8f5"/>

  <!-- coin stacks -->
  <g>
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="382" rx="56" ry="18" fill="#c9911f"/>
    <rect x="114" y="314" width="112" height="68" rx="18" fill="#f2c94c" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="314" rx="56" ry="18" fill="#ffd86a" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="356" rx="56" ry="18" fill="#f2c94c" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="334" rx="56" ry="18" fill="#ffe082" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
  </g>

  <g>
    <ellipse cx="326" cy="402" rx="70" ry="20" fill="#c9911f"/>
    <rect x="256" y="300" width="140" height="102" rx="20" fill="#f2c94c" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="326" cy="300" rx="70" ry="20" fill="#ffd86a" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="326" cy="346" rx="70" ry="20" fill="#ffe082" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="326" cy="324" rx="70" ry="20" fill="#fff0a8" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
  </g>

  <!-- sprout -->
  <path d="M172 305 C172 274 171 260 174 238" fill="none" stroke="#38a169" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M174 245 C152 240 138 224 132 206 C154 206 170 217 177 236" fill="#4fd18f" stroke="#2f9e62" stroke-width="4" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <path d="M177 246 C199 241 214 224 220 206 C198 206 182 217 175 236" fill="#4fd18f" stroke="#2f9e62" stroke-width="4" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

  <!-- small coins floating upward -->
  <circle cx="250" cy="210" r="14" fill="#ffd86a" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
  <circle cx="286" cy="176" r="12" fill="#ffd86a" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
  <circle cx="326" cy="148" r="10" fill="#ffd86a" stroke="#d49a1d" stroke-width="4"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
